title: Canada Health Care, Early Childhood Development and Other Social Services Funding Act
title_en: Canada Health Care, Early Childhood Development and Other Social Services Funding Act
short_name: Canada Health Care, Early Childhood D...
description: Canada Health Care, Early Childhood Development and Other Social Services Funding Act (Canada Health Care, Early Childhood D...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Canada Health Care, Early Childhood Development and Other Social Services Funding Act .

provisions.title: Payment into trust
provisions.content: 2 (1) The Minister of Finance may make a direct payment of $1 billion for the fiscal year beginning on April 1, 2000 to a trust established to provide funding to the provinces for the purpose of the Government of Canada’s contribution towards the purchase of modern medical diagnostic and treatment equipment and the costs directly associated with the installation of that equipment. (2) The amount of funds that may be provided to a province and the release of those funds shall be determined in accordance with the terms of the trust indenture establishing the trust, taking into account the population of that province.

provisions.chapter: Funding for Health Information and Communications Technologies
provisions.title: Payment to corporation
provisions.content: 3 The Minister of Finance may make a direct payment of $500 million for the fiscal year beginning on April 1, 2000 to a corporation, to be named by order of the Governor in Council on the recommendation of the Minister of Health, for the purpose of defining standards governing shared data to ensure the compatibility of health information networks.

provisions.chapter: Payment Out of Consolidated Revenue Fund
provisions.title: Payment out of C.R.F.
provisions.content: 4 The amounts authorized to be paid by sections 2 and 3 shall be paid out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund.
